response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and leadership skills, he falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions. His exposure to GenAI, agentic workflows, and MCP is highly relevant but very recent, and his resume lacks any mention of core role requirements such as Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level engineering experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud (AWS) expertise.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and agentic workflows.
Proven track record of technical leadership, open-source contributions, and mentoring engineering teams.
concerns: Does not meet the strict requirement of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions.
Lacks experience with Python, vector databases, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
No demonstrated background in LLM evaluation pipelines or optimizing model performance metrics.
